summary: Completed comprehensive testing of React financial intelligence dashboard light theme implementation. All dark theme colors successfully replaced with specified light theme palette. All functionality working correctly with excellent visual contrast and readability.
passed_tests: CSS Variables correctly set: --bg-primary: #ffffff, --bg-surface: #f8fafc, --bg-secondary: #f1f5f9, --border-color: #e5e7eb
Text colors properly set: --text-primary: #0f172a, --text-secondary: #64748b, --accent-primary: #2563eb
App background is white (#ffffff) as specified
Sidebar background is light gray (#f1f5f9) with proper contrast
Chat panel background is light surface (#f8fafc) with good readability
Top bar background is white (#ffffff) matching app background
Sidebar hover expansion working smoothly (64px to 200px)
All 4 pages render correctly with light theme: Market Overview, Research Session, Signals & Alerts, Macro Dashboard
Market Overview shows all 5 indices with proper light theme colors
Top Movers table displays with light alternating rows and proper positive/negative color coding
Research Session ticker input working with light theme styling
Research Session scenario badges (Bull/Base/Bear) display with appropriate colors
Signals & Alerts tabs navigation working with light theme
Signals & Alerts active alerts cards (3 found) display correctly
Macro Dashboard key indicators (4 cards) render with light theme
Macro Dashboard global events section displays properly
Chat panel input field working with light background
Chat send functionality working correctly
Chat collapse/expand functionality working smoothly
AI responses display correctly in chat with light theme styling
No dark theme remnants found anywhere in the UI
All positive values show in green (#16a34a) and negative in red (#dc2626)
Border colors consistent throughout using #e5e7eb
Text contrast excellent with dark text on light backgrounds
